name: cowork-starter-skills
description: Free starter skills for Claude CoWork. Solve real business problems with AI-powered workflows.

plugins.name: search-term-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyzes Google Ads search terms. Finds wasted spend, generates negative keyword lists, and surfaces promotion candidates.

plugins.name: csv-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyzes any CSV file and generates an interactive HTML report with charts and insights. Auto-detects data types.

plugins.name: post-meeting
plugins.description: Processes meeting transcripts into action items, decisions, and a ready-to-send follow-up email.

plugins.name: inboxy
plugins.description: Triages messages and emails by priority. Produces an interactive dashboard with draft replies and time estimates.

plugins.name: followups
plugins.description: Scans contacts for overdue relationships, drafts personalised check-in messages, and builds an outreach calendar.

plugins.name: draft-post
plugins.description: Creates polished LinkedIn and X/Twitter posts from rough input with platform-specific formatting.

plugins.name: post-evaluator
plugins.description: Scores social media posts across 5 lenses (Clarity, Voice, Hook, Substance, Platform Fit) with improvement suggestions.

plugins.name: competitor-scraper
plugins.description: Fetches competitor Google Ads via DataForSEO API and generates a competitive intelligence report.
